name: Brazilian Jubilee Cookies/1953
recipeInstructions:
Winner in the senior division of the 1953 Pillsbury Bakeoff.
Combine flour, coffee, baking powder, cinnamon and salt; set aside.
Cream together the shortening, sugar and brown sugar until very creamy. Blend in egg and vanilla; beat well. Add Brazil nuts and the dry ingredients; mix well. Shape into 1-inch balls by teaspoonfuls. Bake on a greased cookie sheet preheated to 350 degrees oven for 12-15 minutes.
Remove from oven and press a solid milk chocolate candy kiss or semisweet chocolate pieces in center of each hot cookie. When chocolate has softened in about 5 minutes, spread to frost. Sprinkle with additional chopped nuts.
